name: Alert: Check of Cancel button after Return button tapping
fullName: My books module: Alert: Check of Cancel button after Return button tapping
statusMessage: 'A Wharf by the Docks' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
statusTrace:

	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BooksSteps.isBookPresent(BooksSteps.java:93)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/MyBooks.feature:177)

testStage.statusMessage: 'A Wharf by the Docks' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
testStage.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'A Wharf by the Docks' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BooksSteps.isBookPresent(BooksSteps.java:93)

steps.name: When  Close tutorial screen
Then  Welcome screen is opened
When  Close welcome screen
Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
When  Enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  Open Catalog
And  Open search modal
And  Search 'available' book of distributor 'Palace Marketplace' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
And  Open Books
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen
steps.statusMessage: 'A Wharf by the Docks' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'A Wharf by the Docks' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BooksSteps.isBookPresent(BooksSteps.java:93)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/MyBooks.feature:177)

steps.name: When  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click RETURN button but cancel the action by clicking CANCEL button on the alert
And  Open Books
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen
